nasb.text: The cords of death encompassed me And the terrors of Sheol came upon me; I found distress and sorrow.

esv.text: The snares of death encompassed me; the pangs of Sheol laid hold on me; I suffered distress and anguish.

cnv.text: 死亡的繩索纏繞著我， 陰間的痛苦抓住我； 我遭遇患難和愁苦。

ccb.text: 死亡的绳索缠绕我， 阴间的恐怖笼罩我， 我被困苦和忧愁淹没。

csbs.text: 死亡的绳索缠绕我， 阴间的苦楚临到我； 我遭遇患难和悲哀的事。
